title: Temporary closure for fumigation
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Community Development offices will close early today, at the latest 16:00, to allow for fumigation of the premises.


> The closure is necessary to ensure a safe and healthy working environment for staff and the public.


The offices will reopen at normal working hours from tomorrow, Friday, 30 January.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
